subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jawhar-i-Hamd I
subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and the pure essence of glorification beseemeth the holy court of the Beloved One, Who hath ever been sanctified from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و ساذج ثنا بساط قدس حضرت محبوبیرا لایق و سزاست که لمیزل مقدس از
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
